signals.headline: Congress Releases Second List of 9 Candidates for West Bengal Assembly Elections | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:

signals.headline: US-Iran ceasefire talks advancing to second round amid fragile two-week truce, but no deal confirmed
signals.raw:
US-Iran ceasefire talks advancing to second round amid fragile two-week truce, but no deal confirmed.** | NO | MED[1][3][4]
